## Domain Skill Affected

<!-- Which domain skill pack is this about? (e.g., bioinformatics, image-analysis, core) -->

## What Happened

<!-- Describe the situation where the convention failed or was missing. Be specific. -->

## What Should Have Happened

<!-- What would the correct convention look like? What guidance would have prevented this? -->

## Suggested Fix

<!-- Propose a change to the convention, or describe what a new convention should cover. -->

## Context

<!-- Any additional context: dataset type, analysis workflow, error messages, etc. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I've checked that this isn't already covered by an existing convention
- [ ] I've searched open issues for duplicates
- [ ] I can provide an example from my own work (anonymized if needed)
